data.name: lblTips.Text
data.value:
Before running this installer, please ensure:
1. Enable IIS via 'Turn Windows features on or off': - Internet Information Services > Web Management Tools > IIS Management Console - Internet Information Services > World Wide Web Services > Application Development Features
2. Install the ASP.NET Core 8.0 Hosting Bundle from: https://dotnet.microsoft.com/download/dotnet/8.0 (Run 'iisreset' from an elevated command prompt after installation)
3. Run this installer as Administrator for IIS site creation.
The .NET SDK is NOT required on the target machine. The Hosting Bundle provides everything needed to run ASP.NET Core apps behind IIS.

data.name: lblConfigNote.Text
data.value:
Note: The connection string above will be written to appsettings.json in the published output. You can also edit it manually after installation.
If 'Create IIS Website' is unchecked, files will only be published to the specified directory and you can configure IIS manually afterwards.
If port 80 is already in use by the Default Web Site, either stop that site first or choose a different port here (e.g. 8080).
